iteration_goal_stated: Replace Italiana with editorial-tier display font (Cormorant parent recommended)
iteration_goal_my_position: PAUSE / REJECT until Stripe checkout and iPhone photo sprints are unblocked. Editorial-only move with near-zero conversion lift at current order volume. Recommend repurposing slot to Stripe button copy, mobile PDP <60s audit, or hero CTA A/B harness.
p0_list: P0-1: Token + cascade swap only — adopt Doc 3 recipe verbatim (Cormorant parent at 500 for display, Cormorant Garamond 400 at body, Noto Serif SC unchanged). One commit, one token. No Fraunces, no Newsreader, no axis experiments this iter.
P0-2: Preload + font-display: swap discipline, self-hosted not Google CDN. Mandatory before any paid traffic on Stripe lands. Prevents FOIT/CLS hero bounce.
P0-3: Hard-test plique-à-jour and all accented strings in H1. line-height: 1.05 minimum. Skipping = visible accent-clip on launch.

P0-4: Lighthouse / Web Vitals diff before and after. Hard gate: if LCP regresses >100ms or CLS >0.05 on mobile 3G, roll back to Italiana. A font change that costs conversion is not editorial-only, it is negative.
p1_list: P1-1: Cormorant SC for EDITION / PLATE NO. / overlines — defer to iter after Stripe + photos land.
P1-2: :lang(zh) weight bump cascade (body 500, h1/h2 500). Bundle with P1-1.
P1-3: A/B Fraunces or Newsreader (variable opsz) — defer until 50+ orders shipped and an actual customer signal exists.
p2_list: P2-1: Paid foundry buy (Mrs Eaves / Semplicita Pro ~$200-500/yr) — revisit at first Series-Seed conversation, not now.
P2-2: Commission custom-named sans (Chesnais Charlotte / Foundrae A-Gothic pattern) — 12-month horizon per Strategic Path B.
P2-3: Cormorant Upright for one ornament accent — backlog.
rejects: REJECT-1: The iteration itself, ahead of Stripe + photo work. If Stripe + photos not unblocked by EOW, pause not run.
REJECT-2: Playfair Display, DM Serif Display, Italiana-as-ornament — all flagged as traps in research, hard reject regardless of timing.
REJECT-3: Italiana → Cormorant Garamond at H1 (the brief-as-written). Use parent Cormorant per Doc 3 correction.
REJECT-4: Touching the wordmark / logo as part of this iter. Out of scope, separate decision.

predictions.panel_avg_score_reasoning: Editorial panels (Pentagram type / Wallpaper voice / T Mag visual etc.) will respond positively to killing Italiana — Doc 1 confirms 0/10 peers use it, and Cormorant lands closer to Pippa Small / Natalie Marie / Cormorant-using editorial cluster. But conversion-relevant panels (Stripe UX, Stripe eng) will be unmoved because the actual commerce wound (no checkout) is untouched. Net: small positive editorial delta, zero commerce delta, weighted average ~+0.3.

conversion_kpi_deltas.pdp_bounce_rate: -0% to -2% (best case, likely unmeasurable at current traffic volume)
conversion_kpi_deltas.mobile_lcp_ms: +50 to +150ms regression risk if P0-2 + P0-4 gates skipped, 0ms if respected
conversion_kpi_deltas.cls_delta: +0.0 to +0.05 risk during font-swap window; 0 if font-display: swap + preload correctly applied
conversion_kpi_deltas.first_click_friction: no change (font does not move first-click)

predictions.investor_perception_delta: +1 to +2 points on a 100-point investor demo readiness scorecard. Real but small. Investor's stated deal-killers (Stripe + photos + Bespoke proof) are untouched.
would_change_position_if: User confirms Stripe is 2+ weeks out and Claude capacity is genuinely free
User confirms a typography-literate investor visit is imminent and Italiana is a visible artifact
Owner explicitly says retail conversion is parked and brand-perception is the only KPI this sprint

preferred_alternative_iterations: PDP buy-bar audit + Stripe checkout button copy prep across USD/GBP/EUR/AUD
Mobile PDP <60s checkout audit + friction list for owner photo sprint
Hero CTA + first-fold trust-strip A/B harness ready for Stripe launch day
conflict_summary: Editorial CEO will likely accept the iteration goal and prioritize the Cormorant swap. Conversion CEO recommends pausing this iteration entirely until Stripe + photos unblock. If forced to run, both archetypes converge on the same P0 list (Doc 3 recipe with preload + accent test + LCP gate) — disagreement is about whether to run at all, not how to execute. Surface this to user as an explicit run / pause decision.
